audit_items.proof_trace: Three interlocking mechanisms prevent UAF: (1) in the list path, `dstkey` is protected by `incrRefCount(dstkey)` at L299 before `unblockClient(receiver)` at L300 frees `receiver->bpop.target`; (2) in the stream path, all `receiver->bpop.*` data is copied to stack variables (L421: `streamID start = *gt`, L432: `noack`, L451: `xread_count`, L449: `xread_group` into `pi`) before `unblockClient(receiver)` at L459 — an explicit comment at L455-458 documents this invariant; (3) `unblockClientWaitingData` immediately nullifies every freed bpop pointer, preventing double-free and stale access.
